commands.review_summary:
The branch adds TUI-local preserved finalized-run maps and consults them when deduplicating chat events after run-state resets.

PR surface: Source +12. Total +12 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was established in this review. The source path is clear: current main clears run state and loads history on matching sessions.changed new/reset, while history replay rebuilds assistant rows without run IDs.
